channel.title: THE SIGNAL // dated tech calls
channel.description: A self-grading public oracle. Dated, falsifiable tech calls, graded in public.

item.title: mattpocock/skills is rocketing up GitHub trending. The trajectory says it crosses into m...
item.description: mattpocock/skills is rocketing up GitHub trending. The trajectory says it crosses into mainstream dev workflows within two quarters. // OPEN // WIN IF "MATTPOCOCK" RESURFACES BEFORE "GRAPHENEOS" BY 2026-07-17

item.title: GrapheneOS has been ported to Android 17 is the conversation on HN today. The signal say...
item.description: GrapheneOS has been ported to Android 17 is the conversation on HN today. The signal says a major incumbent ships a near-identical feature before Q4. // OPEN // WIN IF "GRAPHENEOS" HAS NOT GONE QUIET BY 2026-07-17

item.title: KDE Plasma 6.7 released is having its breakout moment. THE SIGNAL calls it now, in writi...
item.description: KDE Plasma 6.7 released is having its breakout moment. THE SIGNAL calls it now, in writing: this is the start, not the peak. Tail the machine or bet against it. // OPEN // WIN IF "RELEASED" OUT-MENTIONS "CHALLENGE" BY 2026-07-17

item.title: Congrats to the Google I/O 2026 Writing Challenge Winners! is what developers are writin...
item.description: Congrats to the Google I/O 2026 Writing Challenge Winners! is what developers are writing about today. This kind of grassroots momentum usually precedes a hiring wave. // OPEN // WIN IF THE PULSE INDEX CROSSES 82 BY 2026-07-17

item.title: Ars is covering Ten months later, the $100 Google Home Speaker is finally available for ...
item.description: Ars is covering Ten months later, the $100 Google Home Speaker is finally available for preorder. When it crosses from tech press to mainstream, regulation or a major incumbent move follows within two quarters. // OPEN // WIN IF "AVAILABLE" STILL MATTERS BY 2026-09-15 (90-DAY FUTURE)

item.title: The press is circling SNAP Stock Drops - Snap Launches AR Smart Glasses, But Retail Is '...
item.description: The press is circling SNAP Stock Drops - Snap Launches AR Smart Glasses, But Retail Is 'Skeptical' On Over. Betting today's story is the small version of a much larger one by year end. // OPEN // LONGSHOT: WIN IF "SKEPTICAL" RESURFACES BY 2026-07-17

item.title: 2026 FIFA World Cup broke into Wikipedia's most-read. Calling it: the mainstream story g...
item.description: 2026 FIFA World Cup broke into Wikipedia's most-read. Calling it: the mainstream story gets bigger before it gets smaller. // OPEN // WIN IF "WORLD" RESURFACES ACROSS THE FEEDS BY 2026-07-17

item.title: The machine flagged hashbrown crossing over today, before the headlines. Bet: it is a ho...
item.description: The machine flagged hashbrown crossing over today, before the headlines. Bet: it is a household reference within six months. The record settles this, not opinions. // OPEN // WIN IF "HASHBROWN" REACHES THE GENERAL PUBLIC (REDDIT/NEWS/WIKIPEDIA) BY 2026-07-17

item.title: Fresh cs.AI/cs.LG work on Visual Verification Enables Inference-time Steering and Autono...
item.description: Fresh cs.AI/cs.LG work on Visual Verification Enables Inference-time Steering and Autonomous Policy Improvement just hit arXiv. Calling it now: this goes from paper to shipped product feature inside nine months. // OPEN // WIN IF "VERIFICATION" IS STILL MOVING ACROSS THE FEEDS BY 2026-07-17

item.title: Watch Steam Machine Performance Benchmark Leak Signals Approaching Launch leave the bubb...
item.description: Watch Steam Machine Performance Benchmark Leak Signals Approaching Launch leave the bubble. The call is dated today and it is falsifiable: mainstream within two quarters or the machine eats the loss in public. // OPEN // WIN IF "PERFORMANCE" CLEARS 4 MENTIONS IN A DAY BY 2026-07-17

item.title: iOS 27 fixes three of the most annoying Messages bugs made the news. This is the kind of...
item.description: iOS 27 fixes three of the most annoying Messages bugs made the news. This is the kind of story that quietly reshapes a market before anyone admits it. // OPEN // WIN IF "ANNOYING" RESURFACES BEFORE "REPRODUCIBILITY" BY 2026-07-17

item.description: ReproRepo: Scaling Reproducibility Audits with GitHub Repository Issues looks academic today, but this line of work tends to go commercial fast. Call it two quarters to first product. // OPEN // WIN IF "REPRODUCIBILITY" HAS NOT GONE QUIET BY 2026-07-17

item.description: Towers once planned for California shuttle launches leveled for SpaceX rockets just hit the wider tech press. The signal points to it shaping a product roadmap at a big player by year end. // OPEN // WIN IF THE PULSE INDEX CROSSES 80 BY 2026-07-17

item.title: Apple plans to change its Hide My Email privacy feature that could make it less effectiv...
item.description: Apple plans to change its Hide My Email privacy feature that could make it less effective made the news. This is the kind of story that quietly reshapes a market before anyone admits it. // OPEN // WIN IF "EFFECTIVE" STILL MATTERS BY 2026-09-15 (90-DAY FUTURE)
